# defectdojo_product_member (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Product Member

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_product_member" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product
- `role` (Number) The role ID for this product membership
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User
